main.content:
{{SF6-Version |version=[[Street Fighter 6/Version/1.09|1.09]] |gameversion=1.09 |date=February 5, 2025 |summary='''Mai Release'''. Minor bug fixes. |links=[https://www.streetfighter.com/6/buckler/battle_change/20250205 Patch Notes] }} == Mai Patch == * Mai released
== '''Universal Changes''' == * '''Perfect Parry vs. Multi-hit Attacks''' ** Re-applied a fix that prevents later hits of a multi-hit move from being canceled after a Perfect Parry ** This most notably effects {{clr|DR|Drive Impact}} punishes against moves like M. Bison's {{clr|OD|OD Psycho Crusher}} and Lily's {{clr|OD|Windclad OD Condor Spire}} * {{clr|DR|Drive Impact}} ** Fixed issue where the input buffer time after recovery was shorter than usual if the {{clr|DR|DI}} whiffed after absorbing an attack
== '''Character Adjustments''' == === '''Akuma''' === * Forward Ashura Senku (6KKK) ** Expanded throw hurtbox backwards to make it harder to avoid throws when passing through opponent
=== '''Blanka''' === * {{clr|DR|Drive Reversal}} ** No longer moves backward on the first frame
=== '''Cammy''' === * {{clr|SA|SA2}} / {{clr|SA|Air SA2}} ({{clr|SA|214214P}} / {{clr|SA|j.214214P}}) ** Fixed issue where move would not K.O. the opponent when trading hits
=== '''Chun-Li''' === * {{clr|L|2LK}} ** Fixed issue where move could not be canceled into a special when parried by the opponent * {{clr|H|Tenku Kick}} (Modern Controls: 214X~{{clr|H|2H}}) ** Fixed issue where Modern control version had a different jump cancel timing on hit
=== '''Dee Jay''' === * {{clr|M|Threebeat Combo}} ({{clr|L|5LP}}~{{clr|M|MK}}~{{clr|M|MK}}) ** Second attack can now come out while holding a downward direction
=== '''Ed''' === * {{clr|H|Psycho Knuckle Lv.1}} ({{clr|H|5[HP]}}) ** Fixed issue where opponents could not move backwards after being hit late during this move's active frames
=== '''Kimberly''' === * {{clr|DR|Drive Reversal}} ** No longer moves backward on the first frame * {{clr|SA|SA1}} ({{clr|SA|236236K}}) ** Fixed issue where move would not K.O. the opponent when trading hits * {{clr|SA|SA2}} / {{clr|SA|Air SA2}} ({{clr|SA|214214P}} / {{clr|SA|j.214214P}}) ** Fixed issue where move would not K.O. the opponent when trading hits
=== '''M. Bison''' === * {{clr|DR|Drive Impact}} ** Forward movement now begins on frame 2 instead of frame 13 ** Hitbox, hurtbox, armor box, and collision box adjusted to keep overall range and properties similar to before
=== '''Manon''' === * Rond-point (236K/{{clr|OD|KK}}) ** Fixed issue where the move could not be canceled into a {{clr|SA|Super}} when parried by the opponent
=== '''Marisa''' === * {{clr|OD|OD Dimachaerus}} ({{clr|OD|214PP}}) ** {{clr|SA|Super}} cancel buffer window shifted forward from frame 2 → frame 10 ** Less likely to get accidental {{clr|SA|SA2}} cancel when inputting 6P follow-up
=== '''Rashid''' === * {{clr|SA|SA1}} ({{clr|SA|236236K}}) ** Fixed issue where move would not K.O. the opponent when trading hits ** Fixed issue where knockdown time was much shorter when trading hits
=== '''Terry''' === * Forward Walk ** Adjusted animation so that the central axis of the character more closely matches his position (purely a visual change)
=== '''Zangief''' === * Back Walk ** Fixed issue where the first frame moved forward during Burnout
